name: Herb Województwa Mazowieckiego
description: Coat of arms of the Masovian Voivodeship (Województwo Mazowieckie), featuring the white Masovian eagle on a red field. The eagle with a crescent on its breast is derived from the historical coat of arms of the Duchy of Masovia.
blazon: Gules, an eagle displayed argent, armed or, beaked or, with a crescent issuing from between the wings or
